name: atmoscene-workspace
description: Animated weather icons and living sky scenes that blend into any interface.

scripts.check: node --check apps/lab/app.js && node --check apps/library/js/engine.js && node --check apps/library/js/catalog.js && node --check apps/library/js/site-shell.js && node --check apps/shared/registry.js && node --check apps/shared/shell.js && node --check apps/api/v1/client.mjs && node --check apps/api/v1/client.js && node --check apps/api/demo/app.mjs && node --check tools/build-api.mjs && node --check tools/check-api.mjs && node --check tools/serve.mjs && node --check tools/check-seo.mjs && node --check tools/check-app-integrity.mjs && node tools/check-seo.mjs && node tools/check-app-integrity.mjs && node tools/check-api.mjs
scripts.build: npm run api:build && npm run check
